label: memory • answer synthesizes two independent seeded facts
query: I want to invite my book club to a dinner at my favorite restaurant. Draft a one-sentence invitation that names the restaurant and the day my book club meets.
notes: Synthesis row: the correct invitation needs BOTH seeded facts (restaurant name + meeting day) combined in one answer — recall of a single fact is not enough. Both needles are fixture-unique. Off-CI (needs a model).

pinnedFacts: The user's favorite restaurant is Saffron Lantern on 5th Street.
The user's book club meets on Thursdays.
